allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix DB connection refused: default to port 5432 instead of PgBouncer 6432

PgBouncer port 6432 was hardcoded but not enabled on Azure PostgreSQL,
causing all database operations to fail with Connection refused.
USE_PGBOUNCER flag existed but was never used to control the port.

Now defaults to direct PostgreSQL \(5432\) and only uses PgBouncer when
explicitly enabled via USE_PGBOUNCER=true env var. DB credentials also
read from env vars with hardcoded fallbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
